sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2572" key="ai)notu/rannos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰνο-τύραννος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n2572.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dreadful tyrant,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.350</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
